title: lilium wallichianum var. wallichianum
intro: Lilium wallichianum var. wallichianum, also known as the Wallich's Lilium or Himalayan Lily, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family, native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lilium wallichianum var. wallichianum include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is used in the form of powder, oil, or decoction, and is often used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
